source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ 국내 제조인증/3. HAD1717MCW 모델 추가_210723/성적서, 소프트웨어 밸리데이션/(ADD)HAD1717MCW_출하검사성적서.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Final inspection test report for an ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with serial number HAD1717MCW210611001.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports domestic manufacturing certification records by documenting product history, mechanical information, electrical safety tests, performance information, combination tests, console software checks, and labeling checks.
keyPoints: Product Name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector and Model is ADD.
Inspection Date and Date Manufactured are both 2021.06.11.
Electrical safety tests, performance tests, combination tests, console software checks, and labeling checks are recorded as Pass.
Console software is listed as MC0-000060, Version 2.1.255.60.

entities.name: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector
entities.evidence: Product Name,,Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector ,,,,Model,,ADD

evidence.claim: The document is titled '(ADD) Final Inspection Test Report'.
The report identifies the product as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name,,Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector ,,,,Model,,ADD

evidence.claim: The detector serial number is HAD1717MCW210611001.
The report revision is REV.01 and the form revision is REV.05.
The revision history lists initial establishment on 2/9/21 with revision number 00.
Revision 01 was made on 3/16/21 and added a report cover, electrical safety test work-instruction alignment, equipment management numbers, and labeling check points.
evidence.evidenceText: ,3/16/21,01,"1. 성적서 겉표지 추가 2. Electrical Safety Test 검사작업지도서와 동일하게 수정 - 사용 계측기 및 설비 관리번호 추가 3. Labeling Check Point 추가"

evidence.claim: The console software item is MC0-000060, Version 2.1.255.60.
Electrical safety testing includes power input, dielectric strength, protective earth conductor resistance, earth leakage current, touch current, and patient leakage current tests.
The protective earth conductor resistance test result was Pass.
evidence.evidenceText: Protective Earth Conductor Resistance Test,,,,"10sec, 100mΩ, 25A",,Ω,≤ 0.1Ω,,Output [R],0.03 Ω,Pass

evidence.claim: Performance information includes pixel defect, line defect, MTF, DQE, and sensitivity tests, all shown as Pass in the listed results.
Combination testing confirmed detector, power supply, and main cable operation, wired communication, and image acquisition as Pass.
Console software checks include security, search, image acquisition, image storage, image transfer, program close, DICOM conformance, zoom, rotation, contrast adjustment, and partial enlargement.
DICOM transfer and DICOM print/output are included in the console software DICOM conformance checks.
Labeling check points include detector and box labels, sub label, switch box label, exposure switch label, and box label.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is provided only by metadata authoritySignal 'MFDS/domestic' and is not explicitly stated in the document text.
The text is a spreadsheet-like extraction with repeated blank cells and OCR/table flattening artifacts.
Document title and product model are clear, but the file path references HAD1717MCW while the document model field states ADD and the HAD1717MCW value appears in the detector serial number.
